title: CBAM Exposure Check
description: Calculates the financial exposure and operational risk from the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) for industrial facilities, incorporating production efficiency, carbon intensity, and compliance readiness.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total output of the primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total output of the primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birincil ürünün (ör. çelik, çimento, alüminyum) yıllık toplam üretimi (metrik ton).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtproduktion des Primärprodukts (z. B. Stahl, Zement, Aluminium) in metrischen Tonnen pro Jahr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Production totale du produit principal (ex. acier, ciment, aluminium) en tonnes métriques par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Producción total del producto principal (ej. acero, cemento, aluminio) en toneladas métricas por año.

inputs.label: Carbon Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions per ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions per ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 14064 veya GHG Protokolü'ne göre ton ürün başına doğrudan ve dolaylı sera gazı emisyonları.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte und indirekte Treibhausgasemissionen pro Tonne Produkt, basierend auf ISO 14064 oder GHG Protocol.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Émissions directes et indirectes de gaz à effet de serre par tonne de produit, basées sur l'ISO 14064 ou le GHG Protocol.
businessContext_i18n.es: Emisiones directas e indirectas de gases de efecto invernadero por tonelada de producto, basadas en ISO 14064 o GHG Protocol.

inputs.label: CBAM Carbon Price
inputs.businessContext: Expected or current EU ETS allowance price used for CBAM certificate calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected or current EU ETS allowance price used for CBAM certificate calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: CBAM sertifika hesaplaması için beklenen veya mevcut AB ETS emisyon izni fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter oder aktueller EU-ETS-Allowance-Preis für die CBAM-Zertifikatsberechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix attendu ou actuel du quota EU ETS utilisé pour le calcul du certificat CBAM.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio esperado o actual del régimen de comercio de derechos de emisión de la UE utilizado para el cálculo del certificado CBAM.

inputs.label: Free Allocation Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.
businessContext_i18n.tr: CBAM geçiş kuralları kapsamında ücretsiz tahsisatlarla karşılanan emisyonların yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Emissionen, die unter den CBAM-Übergangsregeln durch kostenlose Zertifikate abgedeckt sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des émissions couvertes par des quotas gratuits selon les règles transitoires CBAM.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de emisiones cubiertas por asignaciones gratuitas según las normas transitorias del CBAM.

inputs.label: Production Efficiency Index
inputs.businessContext: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher values reduce waste and emissions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher values reduce waste and emissions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genel ekipman etkinliği (OEE) veya benzer yalın metrik; yüksek değerler atık ve emisyonları azaltır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtanlageneffektivität (OEE) oder ähnliche Lean-Kennzahl; höhere Werte reduzieren Abfall und Emissionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité globale des équipements (OEE) ou métrique Lean similaire ; des valeurs élevées réduisent les déchets et les émissions.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia general del equipo (OEE) o métrica lean similar; valores más altos reducen residuos y emisiones.

inputs.label: Compliance Readiness Score
inputs.businessContext: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness per CBAM requirements.

label_i18n.es: Puntuación de preparación para el cumplimiento

businessContext_i18n.en: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness per CBAM requirements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: CBAM gerekliliklerine göre veri toplama, raporlama sistemleri ve doğrulama hazırlığının değerlendirmesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bewertung der Datenerfassung, Berichtssysteme und Verifizierungsbereitschaft gemäß CBAM-Anforderungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Évaluation de la collecte de données, des systèmes de reporting et de la préparation à la vérification selon les exigences CBAM.
businessContext_i18n.es: Evaluación de la recopilación de datos, sistemas de informes y preparación para la verificación según los requisitos del CBAM.

inputs.label: Industry Benchmark Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

businessContext_i18n.en: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kıyaslama için mevcut en iyi teknoloji (BAT) veya sektör ortalama karbon yoğunluğu (ISO 50001).
businessContext_i18n.de: Beste verfügbare Technologie (BAT) oder sektoraler Durchschnitt der Kohlenstoffintensität für Benchmarking (ISO 50001).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Meilleure technologie disponible (BAT) ou intensité carbone moyenne du secteur pour l'analyse comparative (ISO 50001).
businessContext_i18n.es: Mejor tecnología disponible (BAT) o intensidad de carbono promedio del sector para la evaluación comparativa (ISO 50001).

inputs.label: Emission Scope
inputs.businessContext: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karbon yoğunluğu hesaplamasına hangi emisyon kapsamlarının dahil edildiğini tanımlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Definiert, welche Emissionsbereiche in die Berechnung der Kohlenstoffintensität einbezogen werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Définit les scopes d'émissions inclus dans le calcul de l'intensité carbone.
businessContext_i18n.es: Define qué alcances de emisiones se incluyen en el cálculo de la intensidad de carbono.

rules.message: Carbon intensity exceeds industry benchmark. Consider efficiency improvements to reduce CBAM exposure.
Production efficiency index is below 0.7. Lean Six Sigma initiatives recommended to improve OEE.
Compliance readiness score is low. Immediate investment in data management and verification systems required.
High free allocation may mask true exposure. Re-evaluate allocation assumptions.

thresholds.message: CBAM cost per ton exceeds 50 EUR – high financial risk.
Critical efficiency level – immediate action required.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
